# Vulkan-Headers

This directory vendors the official KhronosGroup Vulkan-Headers release
`v1.4.341` from:

https://github.com/KhronosGroup/Vulkan-Headers/tree/v1.4.341

The preview renderer uses only the C headers. They are retained under the
upstream `include/vulkan` and `include/vk_video` layout so generated header
dependencies remain version-consistent. See `LICENSE.md` for the upstream
Apache-2.0 license.
